description: A customer requires a custom report that cannot be built using the standard reporting tools, requiring a direct database query.

nodes.task_description: Work with the customer to define the exact specifications for the custom report (columns, filters, calculations).

expected_outcome.value: Consultant has a clear and unambiguous set of requirements.

nodes.task_description: Write a complex SQL query against a read-replica of the production database to generate the report data.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant writes an efficient and correct SQL query.

nodes.task_description: Provide the resulting data as a CSV file to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: The customer receives the custom report data they requested.
